ELPAC Level 4
Lexile 1000–1300L
DTR · TALK ABOUT A SCENE

Seventy Years Early

STS-MS7-L4-10001300-MSSS7-FFR-API-02 • MS Social Studies Grade 7 • The Reformation
Look at the picture. You will answer some questions about it. Press the play button to hear each question. Record your answer for each question. You can listen to your answer and record it again. Click SUBMIT RECORDINGS when you have answered all the questions.
JUST FOR FUN · OPTIONAL
At the Forecast Bureau, every reporter's job is to look at one invention and predict what it will change. Metal movable type was cast in Korea and used to print the Jikji in 1377, about seventy years before a press was built in Europe. Once ideas could be printed fast and cheap, a single posted list of complaints in 1517 spread across a continent in weeks instead of years. The reporters here are printing their forecasts on the same kind of machine they are writing about.
If you were a reporter in 1517, what would you predict would change first once anyone could print their ideas quickly?
Optional. You do not have to record this one.
1
What is Minji doing?
Look at the picture. Justify what Minji is doing with evidence from the image, then say what her action tells you about why this group is gathered. Speak in three or more complete sentences.
2
What is Haruto holding?
Look at the picture. Justify what Haruto is holding with evidence from the image, then say what displaying it tells you about the group's work. Speak in three or more complete sentences.
3
What is the teacher doing?
Look at the picture. Justify what the teacher is doing with evidence from the image, then explain where that step fits in the group's process. Speak in three or more complete sentences.
4
What place is this? How do you know?
Look at the picture. Justify your claim about this place with at least two pieces of visible evidence, then say what kind of work this space was set up for. Speak in three or more complete sentences.
5
Tell me about the whole forecast board.
Look at the picture. Justify what the tall board is for with evidence you can read on it, then explain how its parts are arranged and why. Speak in three or more complete sentences.
6
What is Haruto wearing?
Look at the picture. Justify what Haruto is wearing with evidence from the image, then explain how clothing color helps a viewer tell these workers apart. Speak in three or more complete sentences.
Record an answer for each question, then submit.
Content alignment: HSS 7.9 — The Reformation. ELD (Speaking — official ELPAC “Talk About a Scene”): PI.A.1, PII.B.3, PII.B.4, PII.B.5.
